note: Back To Top is a single-settings-form UI module: it attaches a front-end library and stores everything in the back_to_top.settings config object. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts (settings keys, defaults, positions, button types, library, route, permission) an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, where is the Back To Top configuration form (admin path and route name), and which permission gates access to it?
evals.expected_output: The form is at /admin/config/user-interface/back_to_top (route back_to_top_settings, under Admin → Configuration → User interface), gated by the 'access back_to_top settings' permission.

evals.prompt: How do I make Back To Top use a text/CSS button instead of the default PNG image button? Give the config key, its values, and the default.
evals.expected_output: Set back_to_top_button_type on back_to_top.settings to 'text' (values are 'image' or 'text'; default 'image'). 'text' attaches the back_to_top_text CSS library and enables the color settings.

evals.prompt: Which Back To Top settings control how far the user must scroll before the button appears and how fast the scroll-to-top animation runs, and what are their defaults?
evals.expected_output: back_to_top_button_trigger (pixels scrolled before the button fades in, default 100) and back_to_top_speed (scroll animation duration in milliseconds, default 1200), both on back_to_top.settings.

evals.prompt: Which Back To Top setting controls where the button appears on screen, what is its default, and which value places it in the bottom-left corner?
evals.expected_output: back_to_top_button_place (integer 1–9, default 1 = bottom right). Value 2 = bottom left; other values cover bottom/top/mid × left/center/right.

evals.prompt: How do I stop the Back To Top button from showing on mobile/touch devices, on admin pages, and on the front page? Name the config keys.
evals.expected_output: Enable the boolean keys back_to_top_prevent_on_mobile (hides on screens ≤760px), back_to_top_prevent_in_admin (admin/node-edit pages), and back_to_top_prevent_in_front (front page) on back_to_top.settings.

evals.prompt: Which asset library does Back To Top attach to render the button behavior on every page, and what core libraries does it depend on?
evals.expected_output: The back_to_top/back_to_top_js library (js/back_to_top.js), depending on core/jquery, core/drupal, core/drupalSettings and core/once, attached via hook_page_attachments().

evals.prompt: For the Back To Top text/CSS button, which config keys set the background, border, hover, and text colors, and when are they actually applied to the page?
evals.expected_output: back_to_top_bg_color (#F7F7F7), back_to_top_border_color (#CCCCCC), back_to_top_hover_color (#EEEEEE) and back_to_top_text_color (#333333) — emitted as inline <style> on body #backtotop only for the text button and only when a value differs from its default.

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal module I want to override whether Back To Top treats the current route as an admin page (to force the button on/off on specific routes). Which alter hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_back_to_top_admin_prevent(&$is_admin), invoked from is_adminpage() in back_to_top.module to alter the admin-route determination.
